title: Set up project repository
description: Initialize the monorepo, configure linting, and add CI pipeline.

title: Design authentication flow
description: Wireframes and sequence diagrams for login, signup, and password reset.

title: Implement user dashboard layout
description: Sidebar navigation, header, and responsive shell for the main app views.

title: Build task list component
description: Linear-style grouped list with drag-and-drop between status sections.

title: Add task detail modal
description: View and edit task title, description, due date, priority, and status.

title: Connect to backend API
description: Replace dummy data with REST endpoints for CRUD operations on tasks.

title: Write unit tests for task hooks
description: Cover grouping, reordering, and status-change logic.

title: Add keyboard shortcuts
description: Support quick-create, navigate, and status-change via keyboard.

title: Dark mode polish
description: Audit contrast and hover states across all task list components.

title: Deploy staging environment
description: Configure Vercel preview deployments and environment variables.

title: User onboarding tour
description: Interactive walkthrough for first-time users covering core features.

title: Performance audit
description: Profile render times with 500+ tasks and optimize virtual scrolling.
